concept: Craft me a game where I play as an art curator assembling an exhibition by retrieving paintings that have come alive. Inside each painting lies a miniature world with its own rules based on the artistic style - impressionist worlds are blurry and constantly changing, surrealist worlds defy logic, and abstract worlds require thinking in shapes and colors rather than objects. My character can physically enter these painted realms to convince the rebellious art subjects to return to their frames.
